title: Delete dead chatFilter.js code and consolidate chat filtering
description:
Council finding (confirmed by Source-Grounded Archivist): MineflayerAdapter/chatFilter.js was extracted from index.js during Sprint 52 modularization (TSK-0166) but was NEVER wired — index.js does not import it. The file exists as dead code with duplicated SYSTEM_MESSAGE_PATTERNS.

Action:
1. Delete chatFilter.js (dead code — confirmed unwired)
2. Verify that index.js SYSTEM_MESSAGE_PATTERNS covers all required patterns
3. Add JS unit tests for isSystemMessage() covering all SYSTEM_MESSAGE_PATTERNS
4. Document which layer (JS or C#) owns which class of message filtering

Referenced in: Data/Pages/council/2026-06-30-external-audits-council.md
Audit source: Audit A
